item.name: Bekko Rockhugger
item.description:
The round body of this wavekin allows it to be carried swiftly through the ocean's currents, which might explain why it clings so desperately to the ocean's rocks.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The spread of these wavekin to various regions is credited to spectral currents, which are the only force strong enough to wrest them from their rocky homes. Their tendency to settle on the ocean floor has earned them the favor of the Kojin, who sense a kindred spirit in the fish.
